description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a prominent overhanging roof made of corrugated, multi-toned brown panels. The front facade displays a row of colorful shuttered windows—red and teal—above a shaded porch supported by columns, with two main entry doors below. The side elevations are simpler, with small rectangular windows and a single arched entryway, while the rear shows a more utilitarian design with minimal ornamentation and additional doors. The building sits on a circular brown base, suggesting a courtyard or urban lot. The overall appearance is reminiscent of traditional Southeast Asian shophouses, blending residential and commercial elements. The exterior walls are painted a light beige, contrasting with the vibrant window shutters and the textured roof.
description: A two-story beige house with a corrugated brown roof, colorful shuttered windows, and a shaded front porch supported by columns. The design blends traditional and utilitarian elements, with vibrant accents and a prominent overhang.
description_view_0: Front view showing the shaded porch, two main entry doors, and colorful shuttered windows above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arched entryway, two teal windows, and the extended roof overhang.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal ornamentation, small windows, and two plain doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two red windows, an arched entryway, and a plain wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with colorful shuttered windows in rows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a shaded porch with supporting columns, two doors, and an overhanging roof; side entry has an arched opening.
